2605.20876.title: Terminal-World: Scaling Terminal-Agent Environments via Agent Skills
2605.20876.paper_summary: Terminal agents extend Large Language Models with the ability to execute tasks directly in command-line environments, but their progress is bottlenecked by the scarcity of high-quality training data. Existing approaches bootstrap from partial sources such as human-defined seeds or GitHub repositories to instantiate one component and then complete the rest, producing tasks confined to narrow seed distributions, environments misaligned with task semantics, and inefficient trajectories from unguided exploration. To address these limitations, we introduce Terminal-World, a fully automated pipeline that uses agent skills as the central synthesis primitive, which jointly encode what to accomplish, when to apply (preconditions and environment state), and how to execute, enabling task instructions, environments, and teacher trajectories to be co-derived. To further broaden the synthesis space, Terminal-World composes skills into skill teams and skill graphs for multi-role and cross-domain task synthesis. Using this pipeline, we construct 5,723 training environments and train Terminal-World-8B/14B/32B, evaluated across 6 benchmarks where the Terminal-World series consistently outperforms terminal-agent baselines. Notably, using the same teacher model and only 1.2% of the training data, Terminal-World-32B surpasses Nemotron-Terminal-32B on Terminal-Bench 2.0 by +4.5 Pass@1 (31.5) and achieves 43.8 Pass@3.
2605.20876.paper_summary_zh: 終端代理擴展了大型語言模型，使其能夠在命令行環境中直接執行任務，但其進展受到高品質訓練數據稀缺的瓶頸限制。現有的方法從部分來源（如人為定義的種子或 GitHub 倉庫）啟動，以實例化一個組件，然後完成其餘部分，產生受限於狹窄種子分佈的任務、與任務語義不對齊的環境以及來自無指導探索的低效軌跡。為了解決這些限制，我們引入了 Terminal-World，一個完全自動化的管道，使用代理技能作為中央合成原語，這些技能共同編碼要完成的任務、何時應用（前提條件和環境狀態）以及如何執行，從而使任務指令、環境和教師軌跡能夠共同推導。為了進一步擴大合成空間，Terminal-World 將技能組合成技能團隊和技能圖，以進行多角色和跨領域的任務合成。使用這個管道，我們構建了 5,723 個訓練環境並訓練了 Terminal-World-8B/14B/32B，並在 6 個基準測試中進行評估，其中 Terminal-World 系列始終超越終端代理基準。值得注意的是，使用相同的教師模型和僅 1.2% 的訓練數據，Terminal-World-32B 在 Terminal-Bench 2.0 上超越了 Nemotron-Terminal-32B，獲得了 +4.5 Pass@1（31.5）並達到 43.8 Pass@3。
2605.20876.author: Zihao Cheng et.al.
2605.20876.authors: Zihao Cheng, Hongru Wang, Zeming Liu, Xinyi Wang, Xiangrong Zhu, Yuhang Guo, Wei Lin, Jeff Z. Pan, Yunhong Wang
